title: Warm Moroccan Cheese Khleaa
description: A winey, cheese-pull, nostalgic Moroccan dish featuring garlic and a stir-fry. Traditionally served as a snack or dessert, but can be enjoyed as a light meal.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat until melted.
Add the garlic and stir-fry until fragrant, about 1-2 minutes, or until golden brown.
Add the shredded cheese and stir-fry until the cheese is melted and starts to pull away from the skillet, about 3-5 minutes.
Place the skillet under the broiler and let it warm and bubble, about 2 minutes, or until the cheese is golden brown and bubbly.
